FPINTERFACET.TEXT: Adobe form interface for Debit Memo

TYPES.FPCLINE: tt_accounting_doc_item TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_accounting_doc_item.
tt_bset TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_bset.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: MODIFY gt_accounting_doc_item FROM gs_accounting_doc_item TRANSPORTING amount.
split AMOUNT at '.' Into amt1 Amt2." AMT3.
CONCATENATE 'USD:' GV_AMOUNT3 'and Cents' amt2 'Only' into net_amount SEPARATED BY space.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT3 'Rupees' amt2 'Paise' 'Only' into net_amount SEPARATED BY space.
CONCATENATE 'EUR:' GV_AMOUNT3 'and Cents' amt2 'Only' into net_amount SEPARATED BY space.
SPLIT AMOUNT AT '.' INTO amt1 Amt2." AMT3.
*CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT5 'Dollars' amt2 'Cents' into tax_amount SEPARATED BY space.
CONCATENATE 'USD:' GV_AMOUNT5 'and Cents' amt2 'Only' into tax_amount SEPARATED BY space.
CONCATENATE GV_AMOUNT5 'Rupees' amt2 'Paise' 'Only' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY space.
CONCATENATE 'EUR:' GV_AMOUNT5 'and Cents' amt2 'Only' INTO tax_amount SEPARATED BY space.
gv_footer_add = |B Cube Building, Bavdhan, Opp. Bavdhan Police Station | &&
gv_footer_add = |8 Dhanashree Apartment, Survey No. 133/1-2, Off ITI Road, | &&
gv_footer_add = |Row House No.101&102,Survey No. 54/3/4, Near Nikhil | &&

FORMS.FPCLINE: DATA : TEXT_LINES TYPE TABLE OF TLINE,
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
